name: Solisara | Fantasy RPG
description:
Welcome to Solisara, an RPG in which you can be anything.

Check out the Solisara lorebook for details on the world.

This bot was tested on Deepseek v3, I highly recommend using a proxy for the best experience.

Lorebook features:

  • A standardized magic system where the mage must create Magic Circles in their Mana heart. 1st to 7th Circle.

  • A new sword and weapon system known as 'Sword Mastery', a path of refinement and awakening for those who wield the blade. Start from Sword Initiate, all the way to the fabled Grandmaster, who can slice reality. (Yes you can use spears and other weapons with it too if you like.)

  • World locations, biomes, political landscapes and an adventurer's guild with a ranking system (Copper to Adamantine).

In future I will very likely use Solisara, as my main world for creating additional solo characters and scenarios. I'm new to scripts and don't have a lot of free time, so please let me know if you have any constructive feedback or ideas.

I've created some scenarios that you can use if you'd like. (I may add more in the future)

  • The first is the main open ended scenario in which you can essentially create your own.

  • The second scenario puts you in the shoes of someone who is witnessing Ogres and Goblins attacking a group of knights, as they defend a carriage with the Duchess and her daughter inside.

  • In the third scenario you are a new applicant of the Brunhild Magic and Combat Academy, entering the gates for the first time on your way to orientation.

  • The forth scenario has you sitting across from a Steel Rank Adventurer in a rustic tavern, he's telling you a tale. (Personally I like this one, it's a great pathway for learning more of the world in conversation).

The bot should not speak for you, I've done all I can to ensure it plays by the rules. Though you can always add the line into the chat memory, just to be sure: (OOC: Ensure that {{char}} never speaks or acts on behalf of {{user}})
creator: SilverKnight
